query: fluorescent overhead lighting institutional office interior unflattering harsh
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: flat lighting — fluorescent institutional interiors, depressing offices/corridors, depthless cold light

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph of an office interior viewed through a doorway. Multiple office chairs, desks, and empty shelving units occupy the carpeted floor. Fluorescent ceiling panels illuminate the center and rear of the room, while the foreground near the doorway is cast in shadow. On the left wall, a cable hangs down from a pipe running along the ceiling. Additional office furniture and equipment are visible in the background beyond the main room.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph of an office interior viewed through a doorway, evoking atmospheric distress through its bleak and isolating mood. Multiple office chairs, desks, and empty shelving units occupy the carpeted floor in disarray. Harsh fluorescent ceiling panels illuminate the center and rear of the room while the foreground sinks into heavy shadow, creating an oppressive and uneasy atmosphere. On the left wall, a cable hangs down from a pipe running along the ceiling, contributing to the sense of neglect and abandonment. Additional office furniture and equipment visible in the distant background enhance the cavernous, institutional feeling of dread and melancholy.
